description_long: This is a rectangular, dark wooden storage cabinet with a robust, industrial appearance. The cabinet features a slatted front with three horizontal panels, suggesting the presence of drawers or shelves inside. The top surface displays a prominent yellow warning label with a biohazard symbol and the word 'DANGER' in red, indicating it may be used for hazardous materials or secure storage. The sides and back are reinforced with metal corner bolts, adding to its durability and ruggedness. The wood grain is visible throughout, with some areas showing darker stains or wear, giving it a weathered, utilitarian look. The overall construction appears solid and heavy, suitable for use in garages, workshops, or urban utility spaces.
description: A dark wooden, industrial-style cabinet with a slatted front and a yellow biohazard warning label on top. Reinforced with metal bolts, it has a rugged, weathered appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing three horizontal slats, likely drawers or shelves, and the warning label on top.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a solid wooden panel with visible wood grain and metal corner bolts.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front but without slats, showing a solid panel and the warning label on top.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1 with a solid wooden panel and metal bolts.
